new_terms.context: The VR NVL72 compute tray uses cold plates to remove heat from modules.
An internal manifold distributes inlet coolant and collects outlet coolant within the chassis.

new_terms.suggested_translation: 通用快速接头 / 小型快速接头
new_terms.context: Quick disconnect standards (Universal / Miniature) used for coolant routing in the compute tray.
An upgraded cold plate with reduced channel pitch (100 micron) for higher thermal dissipation.
A high-conductivity TIM2 material used between the GPU and the cold plate.
Refers to the stage of manufacturing (PCBA level vs. full system integration level).
Components on the board that require cooling alongside the processors.
